steps.title: Write the possible range
steps.content:
If the elephant pulls water $n$ times, each pull is between $5$ and $11$ liters. For $198$ liters total, the number of pulls must satisfy
$$5n\le 198\le 11n$$

steps.title: Test the viable choice
steps.content: Choice C uses $37$ pulls. $$5(37)=185$$ $$11(37)=407$$ Since $198$ is between $185$ and $407$, this number of pulls is possible. The answer is C.
